title: webauthn.rs: in-memory passkey token store lost on restart
description: File: src/webauthn.rs:23-24. PASSKEY_TOKENS is a static Mutex<HashMap> holding one-time passkey auth tokens. If the server restarts between auth_complete (token issued) and authorize_submit (token consumed), the token is lost and the user's passkey auth silently fails. The 2-minute TTL makes this unlikely but not impossible. Consider storing tokens in the DB alongside webauthn_challenges, which already uses this pattern.
